title: ultraworkers/claw-code
summary: claw-code 是一个完全由 AI 代理管理的博物馆展览项目，使用 Rust 语言和 Gajae-Code / LazyCodex 构建。该项目从开发到维护全程无需人类干预，展示了 AI 自主编程和持续运维的能力。其高星标数反映了社区对 AI 驱动开发模式的关注。
summary_en: claw-code is an agent-managed museum exhibit built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex, developed and maintained entirely without human intervention. It demonstrates AI-driven autonomous programming and continuous maintenance, attracting significant community attention.
